title: Palal #6420
definition:
Palal = "judge"

 1) son of Uzai and one who assisted in restoring the walls of
    Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Palal = "judge"

 1) son of Uzai and one who assisted in restoring the walls of
    Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah

    NASB:  a builder of the Jer. wall
